emails.subject: Re: City of San Antonio
emails.body: Re: City of San Antonio Dan, istead of assigning the contract I would prefer to set up another contract under HPLC and assign that one. What do you think? Also, I need to amend the Southern union contract at Austin (Colorado River Sation) to refect a swap from index to fixed price. Feb 01 5,000 a day $6.28 .199 instead of Index .199 Dan J Hyvl 02/08/2001 11:17 AM
